summary: Ship on the requested Round 2 scope. R-1 is resolved: verification.md:3-10 and spec.md:3-9 clearly supersede the historical slug/classic-token procedure and identify the current SSOT. triage: Clean verdict: note it in your report and COMMIT this artifact with the next bookkeeping commit.
